headline: Scoofyx live feed
subline: Edit this file from GitHub whenever you want the page to change.

windows.title: First live window
windows.text: Duplicate this block in assets/live/live.json to add another update window. Change the title, text, date, and image whenever you want.

windows.title: How this system works
windows.text: This page is meant to be easy to maintain. Add a new object to the windows array, set an image path, and push the changes.
